**🎨 THUMBNAIL CANDIDATES — April 14, 2026 (PT)**

**Story 1 — concept:** Texas dropped money laundering charges against The Lodge but is still holding $2M under a backup "illegal gambling" theory after the civil forfeiture deadline passed.

**A:** "DROPPED. / KEPT IT." — Impossible Paradox — score 90/100
  • concept thumb (courthouse night scene)  •  text: bottom-left, fire orange
  • top points lost: Face/Subject -10 (no person — concept thumb)

**B:** "$2,000,000. / NO CHARGES." — Specific Number — score 90/100
  • concept thumb (evidence locker, cash + chips)  •  text: top-left, cold cyan
  • top points lost: Face/Subject -10 (no person — concept thumb)
  • differentiation from A: courthouse→evidence locker; fire→cold; bottom-left→top-left; paradox→specific number

**Story 2 — Brock Wilson:** Three PokerGO wins in ~30 days — most underrated player in high-roller poker?

**ALT:** "THREE. / IN A ROW." — Absurd Escalation — score 78/100
  • person: center-left with trophy (authentic tournament photo)  •  text: bottom-left, gold
  • top points lost: Visual Hook -6 (sponsor banner distracts), Face/Subject -7 (mild expression), Clarity -3
